title: senecio sylvaticus
intro: Senecio sylvaticus, also known as wood germander, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Senecio sylvaticus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a digestive aid, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, such as indigestion and bloating, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Senecio sylvaticus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
